English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Helmer Hansen menu collection
Hansen, Helmer
8405
.4 cubic feet. .4 cubic feet.
[ca. 1948-1970] Printed material Menus from restaurants including the Stock Yard Inn in Chicago; Ernie's San Francisco; Jules Podell's Copacabana; The Plantations in Moline, Illinois; Hotel Emporio; Martinetti's; Trader Vic's in Oakland, CA; and La Cage in the British Colonial Hotel, Nassau, Bahamas. Collection material in English 7954185
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
February 2013
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, February 2013
Date modified:
RMC Staff, February 2013
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
This collection consists of menus from across the United States, Europe and several countries in the Caribbean. Menus from restaurants including the Stock Yard in Chicago; Ernie's San Francisco; Jules Podell's Copacabana; The Plantations in Moiline, Illinois; Hotel Emporio; Martinetti's; Trader Vic's in Oakland, CA; Top of the Tower in London; Chez Maxim's in Paris, France and La Cage in the British Colonial Hotel, Nassau, Bahamas. The collection also includes some newspaper and magazine clippings about a few of the restaurants. Many of the menus exhibit mid-20th Century graphic design elements.
Cite As:
Helmer Hansen menu collection, #8405. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

Menus -- Bahamas -- History -- 20th century. Menus -- Puerto Rico -- History -- 20th century. Menus -- Canada -- History -- 20th century. Graphic Art -- 20th century. Menus -- United States -- History -- 20th century. Restaurants. Dinners and dining. Gastronomy.
